intent: Shared policy document for local AI coding-agent sandbox wrappers. This file is not natively consumed by every harness; the Docker wrapper and shell shims enforce the portable parts.
deny: reads of host ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, ~/.config/gcloud, ~/.kube, and .env files outside the mounted workspace
notes: Danger-mode agent flags bypass the agent's own prompts, so this policy is defense-in-depth documentation plus shim input, not a universal native config.
Do not mount host credential folders into the container. Use limited-scope API keys when a harness needs model access.
Run git push from the host after reviewing the diff, or temporarily allow it with AGENT_ALLOW_GIT_WRITE=1 inside a trusted session.
